en_title: Get an Exclusive Look at the New Champion Joining the Riftbound TCG
cn_title: 《符文战场》新扩展「Vendetta」独家揭露普朗克
subtitle: 「赋能」关键词登场
opus_summary: 《符文战场》第四弹补充包「Vendetta」将于7月31日推出。IGN独家揭露新稀有英雄普朗克及其「赋能」关键词机制，预发行活动将自7月24日开始。

paragraphs.en: Riftbound’s fourth and newest booster set, Vendetta, is just around the corner. With that comes new faces to the card game as well as new mechanics. So we’re happy to exclusively reveal the new rare champion unit, Gangplank, featuring the keyword Empower alongside his full art overnumbered variant.
paragraphs.cn: 《符文战场》第四弹、也是最新的补充包「Vendetta」即将推出，并将带来新角色与新机制。IGN很高兴独家揭露新的稀有英雄单位普朗克，他拥有「赋能」关键词，另有全图超编号版本。

paragraphs.en: Riftbound continues to introduce more of the League of Legends roster into the card game, and this new Gangplank is one tough cookie. Coming in at six cost with six might, this can be a fairly costly card especially after paying the empower cost. With that said, as soon as Gangplank is empowered, he becomes a sticky tank of sorts, limiting the various ways you can remove him from the field. Any spell or ability that attempts to stun, incur negative might, or bounce him would simply be nullified and instead gain +3 might in its place. He’s kind of absorbing these particular spells or abilities.
paragraphs.cn: 《符文战场》持续把更多《英雄联盟》角色带入卡牌游戏，新普朗克相当棘手。他费用为6、力量为6，在支付赋能费用后成本不低；但一旦完成赋能，他就会成为难以移除的坦克。任何试图眩晕、降低其力量或将他移回手牌的法术与能力都会被无效化，反而令他获得+3力量，仿佛吸收了这些效果。

paragraphs.en: Gangplank is also a Body (Orange) card, so he’ll have all the benefits of staying Mighty and powerful as he holds battlefields. Between the tools available in his rune color and the variety of effects that he can nullify, Gangplank could be a hard counter to certain decks if left unchecked.
paragraphs.cn: 普朗克还是一张体魄(橙色)卡牌，因此能在占据战场时维持强大状态。结合其符文颜色可用的工具，以及能够无效化的多类效果，若不加以应对，普朗克可能会成为某些卡组的强力克星。

paragraphs.en: Riftbound Vendetta’s English release is set for July 31 with pre-release events starting as early as July 24 at your local game stores.
paragraphs.cn: 《符文战场》「Vendetta」英文版定于7月31日发售，线下卡店的预发行活动最早将于7月24日开始。
